flashcards.definition: United Nations Environment Programme, established 1972 at the Stockholm Conference to coordinate global environmental action.
1987 treaty phasing out CFCs and other ozone-depleting substances; ozone layer now recovering.
Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species: regulates and monitors international wildlife trade.
1992 treaty for conservation and sustainable use of biodiversity; includes Kunming-Montreal '30 by 30' framework.
Goal from 2022 Kunming-Montreal Framework to protect 30% of Earth's land and ocean by 2030.
